name: get_options_flow
description: News Gurus Intel API — recent unusual options-flow signals: sweep clusters, large premium prints and IV-context reads across the active equity universe, with direction, strength and confidence. The per-call alternative to $50-150/mo flow subscriptions. Lookback via ?hours= (default 24). Educational

name: get_gamma_exposure
description: News Gurus Intel API — live dealer gamma exposure (GEX) snapshot for one equity/ETF symbol: net gamma, call/put gamma split, and a dealer-regime classification (pinning vs amplifying) for squeeze and volatility analysis. Educational data, not financial advice.

name: get_dark_pool_prints
description: News Gurus Intel API — recent institutional dark-pool prints: symbol, notional, price, share size and exchange context, filtered to significant institutional-scale blocks. Lookback via ?hours= (default 48). Educational data, not financial advice.

name: get_congress_trades
description: News Gurus Intel API — recent US congressional stock transactions: member, party, state, buy/sell, ticker, amount range, transaction and disclosure dates. Optional ?symbol= filter. The per-call alternative to $25-75/mo congressional-data plans. Educational data, not financial advice.

name: get_futures_snapshot
description: News Gurus Intel API — crypto futures/derivatives read for one symbol (BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP...): latest APEX multi-source confluence signals (direction, score, momentum surge, timeframe) plus the current market regime. Educational data, not financial advice.

name: verify_memecoin
description: News Gurus Intel API — token authenticity verdict for one Solana mint: 0-1 realness score, confidence, recommended action (PASS / SMALL_SNIPER / MONITOR / REJECT), rug-risk flags, psyop/pump detection and narrative tags, from a 6-probe on-chain+social verifier with creator rug-history. Returns found

name: get_memecoin_movers
description: News Gurus Intel API — liquidity- and volume-gated memecoin movers for one chain (?chain= solana|base|bsc|ethereum): top gainers, losers and volume leaders with price, liquidity and 24h stats — wash-trade noise filtered out. Educational data, not financial advice.

name: get_equity_rankings
description: News Gurus Intel API — full quality-compounder rankings (high-margin / low-debt / high-cash / growing-revenue US equities + revenue-generating crypto protocols, percentile-scored) PLUS growth-stock LEAPS candidates, in one call. A whole ranked universe per request. Educational data, not financial ad

name: get_polymarket_whale_leaders
description: News Gurus Intel API — Polymarket smart-money leaderboard: whale wallets ranked by informed score, win rate, realized PnL or volume, with specialization and average entry odds. Insider/algo detection per-call — elsewhere this data class sits behind $599/mo API plans. Educational data, not financial

name: get_polymarket_new_wallets
description: News Gurus Intel API — first-time Polymarket bettor fills: fresh wallets taking positions, with fill size, side, outcome price and the wallet's rolling totals. The 'suspiciously confident new wallet' insider-pattern feed. Filter by ?condition_id= / ?side=. Educational data, not financial advice.

name: get_polymarket_market_stats
description: News Gurus Intel API — aggregate wallet intelligence for one Polymarket market (by condition_id): unique wallets, buy/sell volume split, new-wallet count and volume share, and the top-10 buyers. Educational data, not financial advice.

name: get_symbol_sentiment
description: News Gurus Intel API — per-symbol social sentiment: recent sentiment/retail signals (bullish vs bearish counts + net bias) merged with social-intelligence ideas (LunarCrush, StockTwits, Telegram, X) for one ticker. Educational data, not financial advice.

name: get_macro_snapshot
description: News Gurus Intel API — macro one-call read: current market regime plus the latest Fed-speech, BIS, prediction-market and geopolitical intelligence entries from the macro agents. Educational data, not financial advice.

name: get_btc_snapshot
description: News Gurus Intel API — BTC one-call read: dormant/Satoshi-era wallet movement state, the five most recent dormant-wallet moves (BTC, USD value, years dormant), latest APEX BTC confluence signals and the market regime. Educational data, not financial advice.

name: get_institutional_moves
description: News Gurus Intel API — recent institutional 13F position moves across tracked funds: new / increased / decreased / sold positions with shares, value, portfolio weight and filing date. Optional ?symbol= filter. Educational data, not financial advice.

name: get_agents_status
description: News Gurus Intel API — liveness probe: per-agent intelligence output counts over the last 24h with last-seen timestamps, across the 40+ data agents. Verify the engine is live before buying data — same price tier as /x402/regime. Educational data, not financial advice.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_anomalies, get_polymarket_new_wallets · Private data: get_anomalies, verify_memecoin, get_polymarket_new_wallets, get_polymarket_market_stats, get_btc_snapshot · Public sink: get_dark_pool_prints, get_polymarket_market_stats · Destructive: get_mlb_props_sheet.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_anomalies, get_polymarket_new_wallets · Private data: get_anomalies, verify_memecoin, get_polymarket_new_wallets, get_polymarket_market_stats, get_btc_snapshot · Public sink: get_dark_pool_prints, get_polymarket_market_stats · Destructive: get_mlb_props_sheet

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
